• a detailed rationale that explains the need for the skilled service in light of the 
patient’s overall medical condition and experiences, 

• the complexity of the service to be performed, and 

• any other pertinent characteristics of the beneficiary or home 

Clinical notes should be written so that they adequately describe the reaction of a patient
